title: Nursery Rhyme. DXX. Natural History.
content:
[An ancient Suffolk song for a bad singer.]

        There was an old crow
            Sat upon a clod:
        There's an end of my song,
            That's odd!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DXX. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
